subject: Re: 1.09 crashes when starting "Process only this items CFT"
body:
Hi Ute,

could you please change the system's regional format from German to English 
to make . the decimal separator? I've never seen it crash completely on 
German systems, but let's try to fix the easier problem first in case it 
solves the issue.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, November 5, 2020 at 10:31:53 PM UTC+1 
ute.hei...@googlemail.com wrote:

> I just installed Warp 1.09 on our PC (Nvidia Quadro P4000 with 8GB RAM, 
> Windows 10 Enterprise, CUDA 11, GPU driver 441.66 -> 452.39 cannot be 
> installed due to older windows version 1709)
>
> The initial values (i.e. pixel X/Y) can only be set without decimal place 
> which seems strange to me. When changing to "Fourier Space" and starting 
> "process only this items CTF" the software crashes:
>
> System.IndexOutOfRangeException: Der Index war außerhalb des Arraybereichs.
>    bei Warp.Tools.Helper.Subset[T](T[] values, Int32 fromInclusive, Int32 
> toExclusive) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Tools\Helper.cs:Zeile 718.
>    bei Warp.Movie.<>c__DisplayClass294_3.<ProcessCTF>b__9(Int32 i, Int32 
> threadID) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Movie.cs:Zeile 1564.
>    bei Warp.Tools.Helper.<>c__DisplayClass48_0.<ForCPU>b__0(Object id) in 
> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Tools\Helper.cs:Zeile 678.
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.RunInternal(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state, Boolean 
> preserveSyncCtx)
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.Run(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state, Boolean 
> preserveSyncCtx)
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.Run(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state)
>    bei System.Threading.ThreadHelper.ThreadStart(Object obj)
>    bei Warp.Tools.Helper.Subset[T](T[] values, Int32 fromInclusive, Int32 
> toExclusive) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Tools\Helper.cs:Zeile 718.
>    bei Warp.Movie.<>c__DisplayClass294_3.<ProcessCTF>b__9(Int32 i, Int32 
> threadID) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Movie.cs:Zeile 1564.
>    bei Warp.Tools.Helper.<>c__DisplayClass48_0.<ForCPU>b__0(Object id) in 
> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Tools\Helper.cs:Zeile 678.
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.RunInternal(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state, Boolean 
> preserveSyncCtx)
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.Run(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state, Boolean 
> preserveSyncCtx)
>    bei System.Threading.ExecutionContext.Run(ExecutionContext 
> executionContext, ContextCallback callback, Object state)
>    bei System.Threading.ThreadHelper.ThreadStart(Object obj)
>
> What is the issue?
> Thank you very much for your response.
>
> Best regards,
> Ute
>
